title: School

alertmsg.leaveWithoutSaved: You have unsaved changes, do you want to leave without saving?

noSectionWarn: Educator description must contain at least one section
duplicateSectionWarn: Section title exists. Please enter a new section title.
emptySectionWarn: Section title cannot be empty. Please enter again.
discardSectionWarn: The content in this section will be discarded.
noSchool: No school is available for edit. Please create a new school.
noSite: You currently do not have a site or are experiencing an error. Please create a new site to continue.

deleteSchool.title: Are you sure you want to delete this school?
deleteSchool.textInput: Please enter 'delete' to delete this school.
deleteSchool.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete this school and remove your data from our servers.

basic.schoolBrandingDescription: You can set the color and template of your site. The color will be used for the navigation bar, buttons, and other elements on your site
basic.chooseLink: Choose a short and easy-to-remember link for your school
basic.schoolNameDescription: This name will be displayed on the website header, in the search results, and all emails sent to students. It should be the official name of your school.
basic.previewWebsite: Your school website link will be
basic.bannerImageTips: Recommend image aspect ratio 21:9 with width greater than 1,000 pixels.
basic.logoImageTips: The image will be displayed at the navigation bar of all pages. Recommend image aspect ratio 1:1 with width greater than 200 pixels.
basic.schoolToBeDuplicated: Select the school you want to duplicate

contact.details: Students will contact you through the following information for enquiries.
contact.addressTips: Your address will be public on the website. If you are an online school, you can skip this section.
contact.phoneForContact: Phone Number (For applicants & support team to contact you)

gallery.galleryImageTips: The image will be displayed at the gallery of the school page. Required image formats: Aspect ratio 21:9. Recommended width greater than 1,000 pixels.
gallery.deleteImageTips: Are you sure you want to delete this image?

course.COURSE_INSTRUCTOR: Highlight instructors' qualifications, experience, and expertise related to the course topic.
course.COURSE_STUDENT_PERF: Include testimonials or success stories from past students. These testimonials can validate the effectiveness of your courses.
course.COURSE_FEATURES: Clearly state the main goals and objectives of the course. What will students be able to achieve or learn upon completion?
course.COURSE_TARGET: Describe the ideal audience for the course. Who would benefit the most from the course? Consider factors such as skill level and background knowledge.
course.COURSE_SYLLABUS: Summarize the main topics, modules, or areas of study covered in the course.
course.COURSE_APPLICATION: Describe the application process. Specify application requirements and deadlines. Explain the required documents for admission.
course.COURSE_ENQUIRY: Provide contact information. Address frequently asked questions.
course.COURSE_TIMETABLE: Explain the course schedule with date and time. Remember to change the options under "Class" tab if neccessary.

school.SCHOOL_ABOUT_US: Clearly stating the school's purpose, mission and vision.
school.SCHOOL_FACILITIES: Describe the facilities available to students, such as classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and study spaces. Mention any digital platforms or online tools provided to enhance the learning experience.
school.SCHOOL_STUDENT_ACHIEVEMENT: Highlight the achievements of your students and alumni.
school.SCHOOL_QUALIFICATION_AWARDS: Highlight the qualifications, experience, credentials and expertise of the school.
school.SCHOOL_SUPPORT: Provide a comprehensive list of support services offered by the school. This can include academic support, career counseling, mental health services, disability services, tutoring, study skills workshops, and any other relevant services
school.SCHOOL_FAQS: Include admissions-related or course-related questions. You may wish to enrich the previous sections to avoid a long list of FAQs.
school.SCHOOL_AWARDS: Highlight any domestic or international awards.
school.SCHOOL_STUDENT_LIFE: Describe what students will experience at your school. This might not be applicable to your enterprise.
school.SCHOOL_SUCCESS_STORIES: Write engaging stories of your students and alumni. Videos may be linked to this section for persuasiveness.

task.title: To build an attractive school profile, complete the following tasks:
task.schoolDescription: Describe your school with pre-set sections
task.schoolGallery: Upload at least 3 images to your school gallery

tourStep.welcomeContent: You've made it here, ready to start your teaching brand. Flowclass will guide you through the easy steps to build your education website.
tourStep.clickGuide: You can revisit the tour by clicking the
tourStep.clickGuideContent: located at the bottom of the webpage. If you encounter any issues along the way, don't hesitate to reach out for help
tourStep.floatingButton: By clicking this button, we provide our suggestions for crafting an attractive homepage.
tourStep.ClickfloatingButton: After clicking the button, a list will pop up.
tourStep.floatingContent: This menu will provide instructions on the actions you need to take in order to complete your school profile
tourStep.congratulationsContent: You have completed the tour on how to create a homepage. Now, you can quickly create your first school and start your education brand
tourStep.descriptionTab: The description of your school is an essential part of your Flowclass site. It will be displayed on your educator homepage, making it the first thing potential students see when visiting your site
tourStep.contactTab: Contact is the way for students to communicate with you
tourStep.galleryTab: In the Gallery tab, you can upload any photo that can catch your students eyes or illustrate a point
tourStep.name: This will be the name of your education brand that appears at the navigation bar on every webpage.
tourStep.logo: Upload your logo. This will be displayed on every webpage. Oh, and the site icon (favicon) you see on the tabs of your browser.
tourStep.banner: Upload a 21:9 image to showcase your education brand. If you can't design one yourself, we can help you with that.
tourStep.descriptionSection: You've arrived at the core part of your website! We've provided a list of topics that you can write about. This part will be shown directly on the webpage.
tourStep.descriptionSection2: You can freely edit the name of the section titles by clicking the 'three lines' icon. You may also rearrange the order, add new or delete existing sections.
tourStep.aiChat: Need help writing a captivating educator description? Our AI helper can do it for you.
tourStep.textEditor: You can provide your students with more information by including images or videos. We've provided a text editor with options to stylize your text.
tourStep.contact: Students need your primary contact phone number and email to enquire for your courses. They will be shown in the 'course enquiry' section as well as the footer of every page.
tourStep.contact2: We set it up so students can Whatsapp your phone number directly. If you're not comfortable, it's also okay to only provide your email address.
tourStep.address: If you have a physical location, fill in the address here so students know where they will attend the classes.
tourStep.address2: If you are mostly online, just fill in 'online' or leave this section empty.
tourStep.galleryColumn: Showcase your school with images. We've suggested a few categories of photos you can upload to impress your students.
tourStep.galleryBox: The photos you've uploaded will be shown on the 'Gallery' tab of the homepage along with the captions you provided.

schoolGuide: How to build an attractive school?

mySchool.titleDeleteDialog: Do you want to remove admin from school
